notes: Adapted scripts/capture-rd-pipeline-baseline.ts and scripts/verify-rd-pipeline-baseline.ts from roy-agent/scripts/ for ai-agent-bounty (no upstream scripts existed in this repo).
Two parsing adaptations were made versus the upstream templates:
(1) Test command uses `--parallel=4` (equals sign) — `--parallel 4` is parsed by bun as `--parallel` (mode) + positional arg `4` (filter), matching zero test files and yielding a misleading exit-1.

(2) CLI smoke runs `bun dist/bin/bounty.js --help` (the binary entry built from src/bin/bounty.ts which calls runBountyCli()). `bun dist/cli.js --help` exits 0 silently because dist/cli.js is the library form (runBountyCli is exported but never auto-invoked).

Strict-email contract v0.14 is intact: no legacy *Address fallbacks, BOUNTY_IM_ADDRESS deleted, --publisher-email/--grabber-email/--from-email/--to-email are the only accepted identity flags across all bounty CLI commands and /api/bounty/* + /api/messages/* HTTP surfaces (per Phase 5 code review re-run, FB-1+RC-1/2/3 all RESOLVED).
auto_merge=false preserved — final stop remains refactor/bounty-email-only at HEAD 9c39e8c, awaiting user merge-to-main approval per the ⚠️ 合并主分支铁律 (global memory).
